mapper.insert: insert into app_log(id, column_one, column_two, status, remark, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) value (#{appLog.id}, #{appLog.columnOne}, #{appLog.columnTwo}, #{appLog.status}, #{appLog.remark}, #{appLog.createTime}, #{appLog.createBy}, #{appLog.updateTime}, #{appLog.updateBy})
